mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REMEMBER_ME_TOKEN ( user_id, token_hash, expires_at, last_used_at, revoked_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), 'N', NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT token_id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, last_used_at, revoked_yn FROM REMEMBER_ME_TOKEN WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_yn = 'N' AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY token_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE REMEMBER_ME_TOKEN SET last_used_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE token_id = #{tokenId}
UPDATE REMEMBER_ME_TOKEN SET revoked_yn = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
UPDATE REMEMBER_ME_TOKEN SET revoked_yn = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
